svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="幻觉vs真相源决策" id="visDecision3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-133" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1050" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="vision 出疑点 → 代码审计判真伪：真相源是 design token + DOM 扫描，不是看图" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="820" x="120" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="vision 报了一个问题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="380" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CHK" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="代码审计交叉验证
(design token 基线 + DOM computed-style)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="350" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#7f1d1d;fontSize=10;" value="幻觉一：红角标 → 客服悬浮按钮
查 openShopCustomerService() → 无 fixed 悬浮按钮
→ 误报，过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#7f1d1d;fontSize=10;" value="幻觉二：浅渐变 → 白底
查 KdPageShell 默认 --kd-bg-gradient
(#e6eeea→#fafdfb 太浅) → 误报，过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="370" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#7f1d1d;fontSize=10;" value="幻觉三：凭空紫蓝主色
查全量 var(--kd-color-primary)
完全合规 → 纯幻觉，过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="700" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REAL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="真问题：4 文件硬编码颜色(招聘模块蓝色 / FAB 蓝绿渐变)
有可复现代码证据 → 立项修" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="540" x="250" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="护城河不是更强的 vision，是一个机器可读的真相源：vision 是提问题的实习生，终审靠代码事实" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="850" x="100" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_QC" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="CHK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_CH1" edge="1" parent="1" source="CHK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#dc2626;" target="H1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_CH2" edge="1" parent="1" source="CHK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#dc2626;" target="H2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_CH3" edge="1" parent="1" source="CHK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#dc2626;" target="H3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_HR" edge="1" parent="1" source="H2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=10;" target="REAL" value="427 中 4 个"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
